headline: DELL's AI Server Momentum Surges: Can It Drive Long-Term Growth?
summary: Dell Technologies rides surging AI server demand with $64B in orders and a $43B backlog, positioning its AI business as a powerful long-term growth engine.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Rate Cut Hopes Crumble
summary: Markets now see little chance the Federal Reserve cuts rate this year. Just a month ago, about 50 basis points of easing were priced in.

raw.headline: Wall Street Lunch: Rate Cut Hopes Crumble

headline: Jim Cramer Says “You’re Not Buying SMCI, You’re Buying Dell”
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) is one of Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls as oil drops and the U.S. market rises. A caller sought Cramer’s opinion on the stock, and in response, he said, “No, you’re buying Dell. You’re not buying SMCI; you’re buying Dell. I’ve had enough.” Super Micro Computer, Inc. headline: Super Micro Stock Sees Momentum Score Dip Despite Partner Nvidia's Launch Of New Blackwell AI Chips
summary: SMCI's momentum score falls to 12.82 despite new Nvidia-powered Blackwell AI launches. See how high quality scores clash with bearish trends.
